details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia page, took a snapshot, and extracted data directly from the snapshot file. The trajectory shows actual browsing (navigate_page, take_snapshot, grep/read of snapshot file) with the laureate data confirmed in the raw snapshot content at lines 2818-2886. The agent correctly reported all laureates for the 3 most recent years: 2025 (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis), 2024 (John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton), and 2023 (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier), including accurate prize citations for each year.
